query: 哪个本地组件不用云服务也能完成精确术语查找？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should bridge from a Chinese paraphrase to the English FTS5 local full-text evidence, while FTS5-only is expected to miss this target.

node_expectations.content_contains: SQLite FTS5 supports local full-text search without requiring an external service

query: 为什么向量相似检索只应作为辅助能力，而不是系统必须依赖的基础设施？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should map a Chinese design-rationale query to the English BGE-M3 sidecar decision even when the model name and sidecar wording are absent.

node_expectations.content_contains: BGE-M3 as an optional sidecar index rather than a hard dependency

query: 措辞变了但意思相同的笔记，系统怎样还能找回来？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should recover the English evidence about embeddings retrieving semantically related text despite different wording.

node_expectations.content_contains: Dense embeddings can retrieve semantically related text even when exact keywords differ

query: 在引入语义向量之前，系统用什么确定性检索机制打底？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should connect a Chinese non-neural lookup question to the English project state that keeps FTS5 as the baseline before dense retrieval.

node_expectations.content_contains: SQLite FTS5 as the durable keyword retrieval baseline before adding optional dense retrieval

query: 调用方希望助手返回什么形状的上下文？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should map a Chinese output-shape query to the English preference for structured JSON contexts.

node_expectations.content_contains: prefers structured JSON contexts for agent memory recall

query: 早期原型阶段如何避免被云服务绑定？
evaluation_target: Dense retrieval should recover the English local-first workflow hint from a Chinese cloud-lock-in question without relying on local/storage/export/external-service keywords.

node_expectations.content_contains: Use local storage and deterministic export formats before introducing external services
